title: paspalum pisinnum
intro: Paspalum pisinnum, also known as Pigeon Grass, is a type of tropical grass native to the Americas and the Caribbean. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pigeon Grass include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Pigeon Grass can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
